headline: Winrevair Trial Could Recast Merck’s Growth Story In Pulmonary Hypertension
summary: Merck (NYSE:MRK) is approaching phase 2 data for Winrevair in pulmonary hypertension. Results will focus on the 6 minute walk test, a key functional measure in this condition. Positive findings could support advancement to phase 3 trials and broaden Merck’s participation in the pulmonary hypertension market. For you as an investor following NYSE:MRK, Winrevair sits outside the company’s more familiar franchises in oncology and HIV and targets a high value cardiovascular and respiratory...
